rationale: The citing paper references Chevalier and Mayzlin (2006) only in the introduction as part of a grouped citation supporting a broad claim that user-generated content can influence demand or sales. The citation functions as general background motivation for why online chatter matters, not as a specific conceptual or methodological input to the paper's LDA framework. There is no distinct discussion of Chevalier and Mayzlin's design, measures, or findings elsewhere in the citing paper.
